title: Why Trust Your Husband
writer: Paul Cazeneuve, William M. Conselman, George Marshall
actors: Eileen Percy, Harry Myers, Ray Ripley
plot: Elmer Day and his wife, Eunice, are visiting Gilbert and Maud Stone, and the two husbands, wishing to attend a masquerade, plead business engagements to escape from their wives. But the wives, discovering the invitation, also atte...
